issue.title: Broad repo Python reduction sweep AO

commands: find .github .githooks docs reports scripts bigclaw-go/examples bigclaw-go/docs/reports -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-257 changes, and remote branch creation is blocked because `git push -u origin BIG-GO-257` fails with `LibreSSL SSL_connect: SSL_ERROR_SYSCALL` against `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw.git/`.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory across broad repo-heavy directories and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `62626d62`.
Remote SHA equality could not be verified because the push path is blocked and `origin/BIG-GO-257` does not yet exist.
